mapper.select: select recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery a where 1=1 order by recoveryid desc

select b.orderid, DATE_FORMAT(b.basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, b.runcnt, b.jobid, b.version, b.jobname, b.system, b.policy_id, b.keymap_id, b.jobtype, b.runtype, b.calendar, b.time, b.status, b.confirmflag, b.holdflag, b.forceokflag, b.killflag, DATE_FORMAT(b.eststarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as eststarttime, b.runningtime, DATE_FORMAT(b.realstarttime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realstarttime, DATE_FORMAT(b.realendtime,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as realendtime, job_owner_id1, job_owner_name1, job_owner_id2, job_owner_name2, job_owner_id3, job_owner_name3, DATE_FORMAT(b.orderdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as orderdate, b.orderuserid from cotdl.tbl_piiorder b, cotdl.tbl_piiorderstep c where 1=1 and b.orderid = c.orderid and c.steptype = 'EXE_ARCHIVE' and b.status = 'Ended OK'
order by b.orderid desc

select jobid, max(version) as version, max(jobtype) as jobtype, max(runtype) as runtype, max(system) as system, max(calendar) as calendar, max(time) as time, max(job_owner_name1) as job_owner_name1 , max(policy_id) as policy_id, max(keymap_id) as keymap_id, count(jobid) as runcnt, min(basedate) as basedate_min, max(basedate) as basedate_max , max(realstarttime) as lastexedatetime from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where status = 'Ended OK' and jobtype='PII' and runtype not in ('DLM_BATCH','RECOVERY','RESTORE') group by jobid order by jobid

select jobid, max(version) as version, max(jobtype) as jobtype, max(runtype) as runtype, max(system) as system, max(calendar) as calendar, max(time) as time, max(job_owner_name1) as job_owner_name1 , max(policy_id) as policy_id, max(keymap_id) as keymap_id, count(jobid) as runcnt, min(basedate) as basedate_min, max(basedate) as basedate_max , max(realstarttime) as lastexedatetime from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where status = 'Ended OK' and jobtype='PII' and runtype not in ('DLM_BATCH','RECOVERY','RESTORE')
group by jobid order by jobid
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piirecovery (recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{recoveryid}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_orderid}, #{new_orderid}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{old_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select COALESCE(max(recoveryid),10000)+1 from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery
insert into COTDL.tbl_piirecovery (recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{recoveryid}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_orderid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_orderid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, str_to_date(#{basedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%Y/%m/%d'), #{old_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{old_version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{new_jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirecovery set phase= 'APPROVING', status= 'APPLY', upddate= NOW() where recoveryid= #{recoveryid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirecovery set phase= 'REJECTED', upddate= NOW() where recoveryid= #{recoveryid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirecovery set phase= 'APPROVED', status= 'ORDERED', upddate= NOW() where recoveryid= #{recoveryid}
mapper.select: select recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery where recoveryid= #{recoveryid}

select recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery where old_orderid= #{old_orderid}

select recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery where new_orderid= #{new_orderid}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirecovery set new_orderid= #{new_orderid}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upddate= NOW(), upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where recoveryid= #{recoveryid}
update cotdl.tbl_piirecovery set status= (select status from cotdl.tbl_piiorder where orderid= #{new_orderid}) where new_orderid= #{new_orderid}
mapper.select: select old_jobid as jobid, null as version, null as basedate from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery group by old_jobid order by old_jobid

select recoveryid, phase, old_orderid, new_orderid, keymap_id, DATE_FORMAT(basedate,'%Y/%m/%d') as basedate, old_jobid, old_version, new_jobid, status, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d %H:%i:%s') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piirecovery
order by recoveryid desc limit #{offset}, #{amount}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piirecovery set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= NOW() where restoreid= #{restoreid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
